description.en: Dynaudio's statement loudspeaker. The Consequence Ultimate Edition is a 5-way floorstander built around the brand's Esotar2 transducer family — 21 mm super-tweeter, 28 mm tweeter, 52 mm dome midrange, 17 cm Esotar MSP mid-bass and twin 30 cm Esotar2 MSP5 woofers — with crossover frequencies at 350/1350/3000/13500 Hz. Cabinet hand-finished in solid hardwood with brass spikes. Discontinued.
description.es: El parlante de declaración de Dynaudio. El Consequence Ultimate Edition es un floorstander de cinco vías construido alrededor de la familia Esotar2 — super-tweeter de 21 mm, tweeter de 28 mm, midrange de domo de 52 mm, mid-bass Esotar MSP de 17 cm y dos woofers Esotar2 MSP5 de 30 cm — con cortes a 350/1350/3000/13500 Hz. Gabinete terminado a mano en madera maciza con spikes de bronce. Discontinuado.
